## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

## Testing

- [ ] I ran the relevant tests locally
- [ ] I updated or added tests when behavior changed
- [ ] I checked docs or help text if the user-facing flow changed

## Risks

- Any behavior changes, limitations, or migration concerns

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped and reversible
- [ ] The branch is up to date enough to review cleanly
- [ ] Logs, screenshots, or examples are attached when useful
